risk_flags.description: Risk flag definitions, trigger conditions, and recommended actions.

flags.label: Legal Threat
flags.description: Customer has explicitly or implicitly threatened legal action.
flags.action: Do not respond substantively. Escalate to legal/senior team immediately. Acknowledge receipt only.

flags.label: Media / PR Risk
flags.description: Customer threatens public exposure via media or social channels.
flags.action: Flag to PR/comms team. Prioritize resolution before public escalation.

flags.label: GDPR / Data Subject Access Request
flags.description: Customer is requesting access to, deletion of, or correction of personal data under privacy law.
flags.action: Log as formal DSAR. Start 30-day regulatory clock. Route to DPO. Acknowledge receipt within 24hrs.

flags.label: Churn Signal
flags.description: Customer has expressed intent to cancel or switch to a competitor.
flags.action: Route to retention team or senior agent. Resolve underlying issue before addressing churn.

flags.label: Financial Dispute
flags.description: Significant unauthorized or disputed charge; or customer threatens chargeback.
flags.action: Escalate to billing team. Pull account transaction history. Do not confirm or deny the charge before investigation.

flags.label: Repeat Contact
flags.description: Customer has contacted about the same issue multiple times without resolution.
flags.action: Pull prior ticket history. Merge or reference existing cases. Assign to senior agent.

flags.label: VIP / High-Value Customer
flags.description: Customer is flagged as high-value in CRM or account system.
flags.trigger_notes: Triggered by account data, not message content. Set programmatically from CRM.
flags.action: Escalate to senior or dedicated account manager. Expedite resolution.

flags.label: Safety Concern
flags.description: Customer message contains signals of physical or emotional distress.
flags.action: Do not send a standard support response. Escalate immediately to trained staff. Respond with empathy and appropriate resources.

flags.label: Fraud Suspicion
flags.description: Unusual request pattern, identity inconsistency, or suspicious account behavior.
flags.trigger_notes: Triggered by agent judgment or pattern detection — e.g., account accessed from new location, request to change all contact details, unusual refund pattern.
flags.action: Lock ticket for senior review. Do not process request until identity verified. Notify fraud/security team.

flags.label: Policy Exception Required
flags.description: Resolution requires going beyond standard policy limits.
flags.trigger_notes: Triggered when agent determines standard policy cannot resolve the issue.
flags.action: Escalate to team lead or manager for exception approval. Do not commit to exception without approval.

combination_rules.result: Elevate to CRITICAL immediately. Notify legal and PR/comms simultaneously.
combination_rules.action: Senior leadership awareness may be required.

combination_rules.result: HIGH urgency minimum. Assign to retention-experienced senior agent.
combination_rules.action: Treat as at-risk account regardless of original issue severity.
